provenance.notes: Produced by round-tripping self_generated/chart_notes.pptx through `soffice --headless --convert-to pptx`. Final bytes are LibreOffice-authored; the source deck was self-generated by tests/paper/_authoring/build_fixtures.py.

ground_truth.note: LibreOffice re-wrote the native chart WITHOUT an embedded workbook and added its own chart color/style parts. Clone logic must tolerate charts lacking embedded workbooks.
